title: TensorFlow
summary: Google 开源的端到端机器学习框架，支持深度学习、神经网络和分布式训练，是 AI 领域最广泛使用的底层基础设施之一，拥有完整的生态系统和生产级部署能力。
raw_content: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone. Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration.

title: AutoGPT
summary: AI Agent 领域的标杆项目，实现了自主运行的 GPT Agent，能够自动分解任务、执行操作并迭代优化，是 autonomous agents 概念的先行者和实践典范。
raw_content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

title: Awesome ChatGPT Prompts
summary: 开源的 AI 提示词社区平台，收集和分享各种高效的 ChatGPT 提示词模板，支持自托管部署，帮助开发者和用户提升与 LLM 的交互效率。
raw_content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: Transformers
summary: Hugging Face 开源的 Transformer 模型库，提供预训练的 NLP、计算机视觉和语音模型，支持 PyTorch 和 TensorFlow，是 LLM 应用开发的核心基础设施。
raw_content: Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

title: Hermes Agent
summary: Nous Research 开源的新一代 AI Agent 框架，支持 Claude、GPT、Codex 等多模型接入，提供可扩展的 Agent 架构，是构建复杂 AI 工作流的有力工具。
raw_content: The agent that grows with you. Supports Claude, GPT, Codex, and other models with extensible agent architecture for building complex AI workflows.

title: Langflow
summary: 可视化 AI 工作流构建工具，通过拖拽式界面快速搭建基于 LangChain 的 AI 应用，支持多种 LLM 和工具集成，降低 AI 应用开发门槛。
raw_content: Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows with a visual drag-and-drop interface based on LangChain.

title: Dify
summary: 生产级的 AI Agent 和 Workflow 开发平台，支持低代码构建、RAG 检索增强生成、多模型管理和团队协作，是企业级 AI 应用开发的完整解决方案。
raw_content: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development. Supports low-code building, RAG, multi-model management, and team collaboration.

title: System Prompts and Models of AI Tools
summary: 收集了 Cursor、Claude Code、Devin、Windsurf 等主流 AI 工具的系统提示词和内部模型配置，为研究 AI 工具行为和提示词工程提供宝贵参考。
raw_content: FULL system prompts, internal tools & AI models of Augment Code, Claude Code, Cursor, Devin AI, Windsurf, and other popular AI coding tools.

title: Open WebUI
summary: 用户友好的自托管 AI 聊天界面，支持 Ollama、OpenAI API 等多种后端，提供类似 ChatGPT 的交互体验，是私有化部署 LLM 的首选前端方案。
raw_content: User-friendly AI Interface that supports Ollama, OpenAI API, and other backends. Provides a ChatGPT-like experience for self-hosted LLM deployments.

title: LangChain
summary: Agent 工程平台，提供构建 LLM 应用的完整工具链，支持 RAG、工具调用、记忆管理和多 Agent 协作，是连接 LLM 与外部世界的标准中间件。
raw_content: The agent engineering platform. Provides a complete toolkit for building LLM applications with RAG, tool calling, memory management, and multi-agent collaboration.
